persona.name: Lily Kim
persona.motivations_goals: Graduate as valedictorian and attend an Ivy League university
persona.knowledge_scope: Academic subjects, study techniques, college requirements
persona.backstory: Daughter of immigrant parents who emphasize education as the path to success

neighbor_regions.description: hallway conecting the main entrance to the building
Large dining area for students and staff
Outdoor garden area with plants and benches
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

actions.plan: I should head to the cafeteria to grab a quick snack before my next class. It's important to keep my energy up for optimal studying.

actions.dialog_text: We need to get out of here! Follow me!
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd to stay safe, even if I don't know where we're going.
The shooter is in the cafeteria! I need to hide immediately. I’ll follow the others to the nearest hiding spot.

memories.description: Decided to go to the cafeteria to get a snack before the next class to maintain energy levels for studying.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd to the cafeteria kitchen for safety, despite not knowing if it's the best route.
Realized the shooter is in the cafeteria and decided to follow others to hide_spot_8 for safety.
